issues.evidence: The draft obtains the isolation film outer roll and folding medical-frame usable part as externally isolated components, while the sterile power interface / harness is contaminated and abandoned. The Simple Medical Bay remains explicitly not installed and not started.
issues.suggested_fix: In acceptance state, record Simple Medical Bay material conditions as partially met / majority advanced, not module activation.

issues.evidence: The draft keeps contaminated hooks, rod tips, the aid bag, and external components outside the RV living area. Grey-white residue is not directly sampled or brought inside.
issues.suggested_fix: State updates should preserve external isolation and not convert residue into usable material yet.

issues.evidence: The draft stays outside Qinghe medical point and does not enter the main building or explain the Qinghe survivor organization.
issues.suggested_fix: Keep exterior-only scope; chapter 15 can escalate exterior pressure without a full internal politics reveal.

issues.evidence: The abdominal bleeding man and low-fever child remain outside, obey light / sound rules, and are not allowed aboard. Zhou Xiaohe remains a temporary observation patient.
issues.suggested_fix: Do not record any boarding, crew, or formal ally upgrade for these characters.

issues.evidence: The ending upgrades mimicry into a false Lu Chenzhou command, '门开了，上车', while true Lu remains inside and does not issue that order.
issues.suggested_fix: Record this as observed voice-command mimicry, not proof of full monster ecology or outside knowledge of the RV system.

issues.evidence: No old-protocol fault code or father-route hard clue appears; the chapter leaves that obligation for later unit chapters.
issues.suggested_fix: No father-thread hard evidence update is needed for chapter 14.

proposed_state_updates: Chapter 14 at Qinghe medical-point exterior: Lu Chenzhou designs a short-window material retrieval route while keeping the RV running, doors closed, and retreat line preserved.

Lin Zhixia identifies visible Simple Medical Bay materials and distinguishes usable components, contaminated parts, and residue samples: isolation film outer roll and folding medical-frame usable part are externally isolated; the sterile power interface / harness is abandoned after contamination contact.
The RV obtains a majority advance toward Simple Medical Bay material conditions, but the module is not installed, unlocked, or activated.
Clean filter low-efficiency window continues to shrink from about 14 minutes to about 6 minutes; rear temporary sealing pressure worsens during the exterior operation.
Grey-white vine residue remains uncollected / unjudged; it is not brought into the living area and does not become a free module material.
The abdominal bleeding man and low-fever child remain outside and survive only by following light / no-sound instructions; neither boards.
External survivors attempt to pressure or seize materials, but no full Qinghe faction structure is revealed.
Voice mimicry escalates to a false Lu Chenzhou command after the outer-warehouse side door remotely opens: '门开了，上车.' True Lu Chenzhou rejects external command authority.
human_approval_needed: Approve chapter 14 gaining a majority of Simple Medical Bay material conditions without installing or activating the module.
Approve isolation film outer roll and folding medical-frame usable part as externally isolated, pending cleaning / installation components.
Approve sterile power interface / harness being abandoned due to contamination contact.
Approve grey-white vine residue remaining uncollected / unjudged rather than becoming usable material.
Approve voice mimicry upgrading into a false Lu Chenzhou boarding command without external knowledge of the RV system's formal name.
